query:
START TRANSACTION;
UPDATE `products`
SET
  `stationCode` = 'B',
  `productStatus` = 'pending_b',
  `sheetRowNumber` = CASE WHEN `batchNo` = '00500025410' THEN NULL ELSE `sheetRowNumber` END,
  `updatedAt` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE `batchNo` IN ('00500025407', '00500025410')
  AND `archivedAt` IS NULL;

INSERT INTO `station_tasks` (`productId`, `stationCode`, `stationTaskStatus`, `dueDate`, `resultSummary`, `metadata`)
SELECT
  p.`id`,
  'B',
  'pending',
  CURDATE(),
  'B 站軟測 待處理',
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'sourceStation', 'A2',
    'source', 'manual_repair',
    'reason', 'repair_a2_completed_without_b_task'
  )
FROM `products` p
LEFT JOIN `station_tasks` t
  ON t.`productId` = p.`id`
 AND t.`stationCode` = 'B'
 AND t.`stationTaskStatus` IN ('pending', 'in_progress', 'overdue', 'returned')
WHERE p.`batchNo` IN ('00500025407', '00500025410')
  AND p.`archivedAt` IS NULL
  AND t.`id` IS NULL;
COMMIT;
